title: NoteDecryptor trait txid parameter contract not enforced — silent wrong storage
description: scanner.rs NoteDecryptor::try_decrypt_sapling documents txid as '32-byte little-endian transaction identifier' but does not enforce this at the type level. Any future implementor who passes display-form (reversed) txid bytes gets silent incorrect note storage — the stored txid hex will be wrong, breaking tx history lookups. Consider wrapping in a newtype (e.g., RawTxHash([u8;32])) to make the encoding explicit at the type level.
